findings.title: DynamicTickArray unsafe pointer cast relies on undocumented Solana 10K padding
findings.description: DynamicTickArrayLoader::load() casts account data to a fixed MAX_LEN struct without size check. Out-of-bounds reads fall into Solana's 10K zero-padding region, returning zeros (correctly treating ticks as uninitialized). UB in Rust semantics; safe in current SBF VM. Not exploitable unless Solana changes padding guarantee.
findings.reason_not_submit: Zero funds at risk today. Requires VM change to exploit. Informational/Low in VRC v2.3.

findings.title: decrease_tick_array_size missing MIN_LEN lower-bound guard
findings.description: No explicit check that data_len >= MIN_LEN + 112 before decrease. Invariant holds (decrease only after increase), but not code-enforced.

findings.title: transfer_locked_position missing seeds re-derivation on lock_config
findings.description: has_one = position used without seeds+bump re-derivation. Write-side (lock_position init with PDA seeds) prevents exploitation since only program can create LockConfig accounts.

findings.title: protocol_fee_owed bare addition with overflow-checks=false in release
findings.description: protocol_fee_owed_a/b uses bare += which can silently wrap in release mode. Only affects Orca protocol revenue, not user funds. Requires >u64::MAX protocol fee accumulation before collection.

findings.title: collect_fees/reward destination not bound to position owner
findings.description: A malicious NFT delegate can redirect collected fees/rewards to an arbitrary token account. By design (mirrors Uniswap V3). Only affects users who delegate their position NFT to untrusted parties.
findings.reason_not_submit: By design. Identical to Uniswap V3. User must knowingly delegate to an untrusted party.

findings.title: H-ORACLE-1 adaptive fee staleness reduction opportunistic
findings.description: After 3600s of inactivity, volatility_reference resets to 0, allowing ~98% fee reduction on next small swap. Attacker cannot force inactivity. Documented DoS recovery mechanism.
findings.reason_not_submit: Documented design behavior. Attacker cannot force the condition. No funds at risk (fee savings ≠ theft).

conclusion: CLEAN — No Critical or High vulnerability found in Orca Whirlpools after exhaustive 17-agent swarm covering all known CLMM exploit patterns, all major instruction paths, and all novel features (adaptive fee oracle, DynamicTickArray, sparse swap, Pinocchio port, locked positions). The codebase demonstrates rigorous security engineering.
next_vectors_to_try: Cross-protocol: flash loan via Kamino + Whirlpools exotic position in same tx
Token-2022 transfer fee hook re-entry via collect_fees (CEI confirmed, low priority)
Jito bundle frontrun on adaptive fee oracle reset window
Position bundle NFT account validation in close_bundled_position

agents.notes: Authority check, index bounds, bitmap, delete guard - all correct
Fee checkpoint prevents theft, JIT economically non-viable, delegation requires victim sig
wrapping_sub consistent, uninitialized skipped, timestamp monotonic, vault cap tight
U256 prevents overflow, equal prices=0, limit validation correct, zero liquidity handled
TokenBadge only at init (by design), adaptive fee accumulator correct

ae14cf07811033ecc.verdict: DEAD - adaptive fee delegation is admin-controlled; no sub-range enforcement but admin trust issue only

ab9015b247186e781.verdict: DESIGN - transfer fee tokens cause withheld accumulation; no attacker profit; LP/protocol receive less than fee_owed

a347937b28e2bb5b4.verdict: DEAD - Pinocchio port equivalent to Anchor; only discrepancy (token_owner_account mint check) compensated by SPL transfer_checked

manual_findings.result: DEAD - same fee_tier PDA prefix blocks collision; verify_supported_token_mint called
DEAD - AdaptiveFeeTier uses same PDA seeds as FeeTier intentionally (confirmed by code comment)
DEAD - SPL Token enforces mint match; token_authority must own deposit account; no theft path
DEAD - is_position_empty() enforced at line 90 of position.rs
DEAD - Solana atomicity ensures no partial state; double-call sends 0
DEAD - requires u64::MAX tokens in existence; impossible for real tokens
DEAD - Anchor PDA seeds enforce correct oracle; OracleAccessor validates discriminator+owner
DEAD - validate_constants enforces max_volatility_accumulator * tick_group_size <= u32::MAX at line 89
DEAD - locked position check added; is_position_empty enforced; Token2022 CPI for burn
DEAD - owner-only (not delegate); unfreeze-transfer-refreeze atomic; lock_config updated

medium.title: DynamicTickArray unsafe pointer cast relies on Solana 10K zero-padding
medium.status: zero funds at risk currently; implementation assumption

low.title: Token-2022 transfer fee withheld amounts accumulate in vaults untracked by Whirlpool
low.status: no attacker profit; LP fees go to mint fee authority; by Token-2022 design

informational.title: delegated_fee_authority has no admin-configurable sub-range constraint
informational.status: admin trust design choice; no code bug
